name: Stuffed Rabbit, Armagh Style (Irish)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and dry the rabbit.
2. Chop onions and fry gently in 2 oz of butter until they are golden brown.
3. Peel apples and chop; add to onions and continue frying until soft.
4. Mix the onions, chopped apple, and remaining butter with all other stuffing ingredients.
5. Brown the mixture quickly in the remaining butter.
6. Place the rabbit in a casserole dish, stuff it generously, surround it with excess stuffing, and add well-seasoned stock.
7. Cook for 1 3/4 hours at 350°F, or until tender.
